articles.title: Vijay Deverakonda's Ranabaali director on casting The Mummy actor Arnold Vosloo: 'I was star-struck'
articles.description: Director Rahul Sankrityan has opened up about casting The Mummy star Arnold Vosloo as the antagonist in Vijay Deverakonda's upcoming historical epic Ranabaali. The filmmaker recalled being star-struck upon meeting the Hollywood actor.

articles.description: Mumbai-Bengaluru Vande Bharat is one of the most awaited trains in India. The route will run between Mumbai's Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Terminus (CSMT) and Bengaluru's KSR station, and as per reports, the train will reduce travel time from over 20 hours to roughly 14–17 hours.

articles.title: Anand Mahindra offers help to 80-year-old who plays his 40-year-old broken violin on the pavement daily
articles.description: Mahindra Group Chairman Anand Mahindra has pledged support to an 80-year-old violinist, Bhagwan Mallick, whose poignant video went viral. Mallick, despite failing eyesight and a broken violin, plays daily on the pavement, earning a meager ₹100 to support his wife. Mahindra's offer has sparked wider calls for structured support networks for vulnerable individuals, highlighting the resilience and dignity of those facing extreme poverty.

articles.title: Chandan Anand from Hastinapur Ke Veer: I suggested to use lens in one eye to give Shakuni a slightly mysterious presence
articles.description: Chandan Anand opens up about his role as Shakuni in 'Hastinapur Ke Veer,' discussing the extensive preparation he undertook, such as perfecting vocal details and utilizing a distinctive lens for his eyes. He portrays Shakuni as a charming 'fun uncle' to the young princes, demonstrating his subtle, yet powerful influence. Anand also describes the inspiration behind Shakuni's memorable clap and expresses his admiration for the character's eye-catching costume.

articles.title: Meta expands its smart glasses portfolio with new Meta Glasses Line starting at $299
articles.description: Meta and EssilorLuxottica have launched new AI-powered smart glasses, Meta Glasses, starting at $299. These glasses feature updated designs, improved comfort, and are powered by Meta's latest AI model, Muse Spark, offering enhanced contextual understanding. Key features include voice control, open-ear speakers, hands-free capture, and extended battery life. New features like Dynamic Photo and expanded live translation are also on the horizon, with availability in several global markets.

articles.title: Raja Raghuvanshi to Ketan Agarwal: Two weddings, two murder plots, one chilling pattern
What is Norway's 'Viking Row'? Fans' viral World Cup celebration sends social media into a frenzy
articles.description: Norway's 'Viking Row' fan celebration has taken the FIFA World Cup by storm, captivating audiences worldwide. Inspired by Viking heritage, supporters and players alike perform synchronized rowing motions, symbolizing unity and a fighting spirit. This viral trend, seen from stadiums to New York City, highlights the team's strong performance, with Erling Haaland leading the charge.

articles.title: "Horrible asf": FIFA World Cup anthem featuring TWICE's JIHYO sparks backlash as fans slam AI-heavy music video
articles.description: TWICE's JIHYO joined RedOne's FIFA World Cup anthem "Follow Me", alongside French Montana, LUDMILLA and Adriana C. While fans widely praised the song and JIHYO's vocals, the music video drew heavy criticism for its AI-generated visuals. Many called the track "10/10" but described the MV as disappointing, saying JIHYO deserved better production. The AI-heavy video quickly sparked debate across social media despite the collaboration's star-studded lineup.

articles.title: Nancy Guthrie Big Update: Savannah Guthrie breaks silence on mother’s ‘dead or alive’ ransom note claims, makes fresh appeal amid ongoing probe; watch here
articles.description: Savannah Guthrie made a heartfelt plea for information regarding her mother, Nancy Guthrie, missing for nearly five months. Nancy, 84, vanished from her Tucson home on February 1, 2026. Despite a masked stranger captured on camera and blood found on the porch, the case remains open. Savannah emphasized her family's ongoing agony and unwavering search, urging anyone with knowledge to come forward.

articles.title: "Travis wants to have a child, but Taylor does not": Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's reported family differences ignite fresh relationship speculation
articles.description: A viral social media post claimed Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce were heading for a breakup over disagreements about marriage and children, even alleging deeply personal events and attributing a quote to Swift. However, there is no credible evidence supporting these claims. Neither Swift nor Kelce has addressed the rumors, and no reputable outlet has verified them, making the allegations unsubstantiated speculation rather than established fact.

articles.title: "Extended a wedding invitation to Blake": Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's reported wedding guest list takes an unexpected twist with Blake Lively update
articles.description: Taylor Swift and Blake Lively's friendship is back in the spotlight after a report claimed Lively has not received an invitation to Swift's rumored wedding with Travis Kelce. The claim contradicts earlier reports that the two were reconnecting following Lively's legal dispute with Justin Baldoni. Neither Swift nor Lively has confirmed the reports, leaving fans speculating about the status of their longtime friendship and the rumored wedding guest list.

articles.title: Gram Chikitsalay Season 2 Review: Amol Parashar’s Rural Drama Is Just What The Doctor Ordered
articles.description: Gram Chikitsalay Season 2 review: Amol Parashar’s TVF series returns stronger with humour, heart, rural charm and a sweet surprise for Panchayat fans.

articles.title: BTS star Jungkook's stalker faces deportation from South Korea
articles.description: A Brazilian woman faces deportation from South Korea after receiving a suspended prison sentence for stalking BTS member Jungkook. She repeatedly visited his Seoul residence, ignoring police warnings and even ringing his doorbell 133 times. Authorities deemed her actions an "extreme level of obsession." The court, however, found the risk of reoffending "not significant," leading to the suspended sentence, though deportation remains a possibility pending appeal.

articles.title: "Makes total sense": Tom Brady breaks silence with cryptic post as Gisele Bündchen's Father's Day snub sparks outrage
articles.description: Tom Brady, the NFL legend, might have been divorced from Gisele Bundchen for four years now but their marriage has continued to dominate headlines sparking chaos among millions of fans worldwide. While the two have avoided each other in public, Gisele Bundchen’s recent post has sparked a heated debate. Amid all the mess, Tom Brady has shared a cryptic post.

articles.title: Tom Cruise unveils 'Digger' clip; reflects on 46 yrs in Hollywood - WATCH
articles.description: Tom Cruise is set to surprise audiences in Alejandro Gonzalez Inarritu's upcoming black comedy, 'Digger.' A newly released trailer teases Cruise as Digger Rockwell, a powerful, darkly comic figure far removed from his action-hero persona. The film, described as wild and funny, marks a potentially challenging and fearless role for the iconic star, with the full trailer arriving July 13th.

articles.title: Quote of the day by John Denver: 'Perhaps love is like a resting place, a shelter from the storm..' ; American folk singer's hit song teaches us that true love is all about healing
articles.description: John Denver's timeless lyrics from 'Perhaps Love' reveal love as a profound sanctuary, offering solace and warmth during life's storms. More than fleeting passion, it's a steadfast refuge providing strength and comfort, especially in times of loneliness and hardship. Denver, a celebrated 70s folk icon, masterfully captured this enduring essence of love, reminding us of its power to heal and guide us home.

articles.title: Tom Holland, Zendaya Tease Fans With Sneaky Romantic Photos During Spider-Man Brand New Day Promotions
articles.description: Tom Holland and Zendaya recently confirmed their wedding plans while continuing promotions for Spider-Man: Brand New Day. articles.title: Ram Charan heaps praise on Ranveer’s Dhurandhar franchise
articles.description: Ram Charan has lauded Ranveer Singh's Dhurandhar franchise, describing it as a "terrific, fantastic, phenomenal" cinematic experience and attributing its massive success to the way audiences across India have embraced it. Ram Charan also weighed in on the franchise's phenomenal box office run, saying the collections reflect the audience's love for the film.

articles.title: Balan The Boy review: Chidambaram's superbly crafted drama traces a mother and son hiding against the world
articles.description: Balan The Boy is both ambitious and ambiguous. Like the best of films, it continues to linger and grow long after it is over.

articles.description: Dustin Hoffman, Juliette Binoche, Robert Richardson, and Jeffrey Wright will be honoured at the 60th Karlovy Vary International Film Festival. Hoffman, Binoche, and Richardson will receive Crystal Globes, while Wright will receive the President's Award.

articles.title: Voicemails for Isabelle on Netflix: Why this new rom-com is turning viewers into an emotional mess, what the story is about, and why everyone is calling it “heartbreaking yet beautiful”
articles.description: Voicemails for Isabelle: A new Netflix film, Voicemails for Isabelle, is captivating audiences with its profound emotional depth, moving beyond typical rom-com tropes. The movie explores love, loss, and unspoken feelings through intimate voicemails, resonating deeply with viewers who describe it as an unexpected emotional journey. Director Leah's personal vision emphasizes subtlety, allowing silence and recorded messages to convey powerful sentiments, making it a standout in today's streaming content.

articles.title: R Madhavan Dedicates Padma Shri To 'Every Person' Who Watched His Films - Priyanka Chopra, Bipasha Basu Send Wishes
articles.description: R Madhavan expressed gratitude for receiving the Padma Shri for his contribution to Indian cinema. The honour celebrated his career spanning television, Tamil and Hindi films. The actor posted a lenghty note on Instagram, reflecting on his journey.
